heading: Omitted

notes: CodificationSection, , , , which related to disposition of funds credited to the Shoshone-Bannock Tribes of the Fort Hall Reservation, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.Pub. L. 92–442, § 286 Stat. 744Sept. 29, 1972
